name: Showing Coordination
description: Leasing coordinates listing inquiries, prequalification, showing readiness, follow-up drafts, and application handoff with approval gates before applicant-facing messages or appointments.

stages.name: Normalize Inquiry
stages.description: Normalize lead, listing, property, and channel facts before response drafting.

steps.title: Normalize showing inquiry
steps.instructions: Normalize lead name, contact, inquiry channel, listing ref, property, unit, desired move date, pets, occupants, budget, prequal status, source timestamp, and data confidence. Any missing listing, application, or lead data must be null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize showing inquiry facts and missing-data flags. No applicant sends and no appointment creation.

steps.title: Review inquiry routing
steps.instructions: Review whether the inquiry is valid, spam, duplicate, waitlist, unavailable listing, or needs manual handling before applicant-facing response is staged.
steps.human_prompt: Review inquiry routing before applicant-facing response or scheduling.

stages.name: Stage Prequalification
stages.description: Prepare prequalification and scheduling options without contacting the prospect.

steps.title: Draft prequalification response
steps.instructions: Draft a prequalification response covering availability, basic criteria, application link status, showing requirements, pets, fees, and next-step questions. Draft-only; do not send.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft applicant-facing prequalification response only. No external sends.

steps.title: Prepare showing options
steps.instructions: Prepare candidate showing windows, access notes, lockbox caveats, occupied-unit restrictions, open make-ready blockers, and required confirmations. Do not create appointments or send scheduling links.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal showing options and access caveats. No appointment creation and no applicant sends.

steps.title: Check access readiness
steps.instructions: Check access readiness, occupied-unit restrictions, lockbox/key status, safety blockers, open work orders, and make-ready state. Do not update locks, create access, or contact residents.
steps.dispatch_body: Check access readiness and blockers for showing coordination. No resident contact and no system writes.

stages.name: Approve Applicant Contact
stages.description: Human approval before applicant contact, scheduling, or appointment creation.

steps.title: Approve prequal and scheduling send
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, hold, or reject the applicant-facing prequalification response and showing options before any message, scheduling link, or appointment is created.
steps.human_prompt: Human approval required before applicant-facing showing response or appointment creation.

steps.title: Stage approved showing response
steps.instructions: Stage approved applicant response, showing options, access caveats, and scheduling metadata for a human/operator release path. Do not send, create appointments, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved applicant response and showing options only. No external sends, appointments, or AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Follow Up And Handoff
stages.description: Track showing outcome and prepare application handoff if the prospect advances.

steps.title: Record showing outcome
steps.instructions: Record showing outcome as scheduled, completed, no-show, cancelled, duplicate, unavailable, application-started, or needs_verification, with source and timestamp. Do not contact the prospect.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal showing outcome metadata. No applicant sends.

steps.title: Draft post-showing follow-up
steps.instructions: Draft post-showing follow-up or application next-step language based on the recorded outcome. Draft-only; do not send.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft post-showing follow-up only. No external sends.

steps.title: Handoff application screening
steps.instructions: If the prospect starts an application, stage internal handoff facts for application-screening-move-in: lead refs, property, unit, showing outcome, application link status, and needs_verification flags. Do not create application records or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage internal handoff to application-screening-move-in. No application creation and no AppFolio writes.
